title: Visible Tripwires
description: Resource pack for Minecraft that improves visibility of tripwires by changing their texture and model to a new, more visible one.
body:
# Visible Tripwires

Visible Tripwires is a Minecraft resource pack that makes tripwires easier to see by changing their textures and models. It can really help players who want to spot tripwires more clearly.

The resource pack adds three different looks for tripwires:

1. **Normal State**: In this state, the tripwire lies on the ground and has a standard white texture.
![Normal tripwire (before and after)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hrYdC8aM/images/d0f959df75425de455e88674e1ecc3111bdcfe65.png)

2. **Attached State**: When stretched between two tripwire hooks, the wire lifts off the ground and turns blue.
![Attached tripwire (before and after)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hrYdC8aM/images/beac296289e2d387b2b59a7fd6f68a222469ba77.png)

3. **Powered State**: When something touches the wire after it's been set up, it moves back down to the ground and turns red.
![Powered tripwire (before and after)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hrYdC8aM/images/6cc5d9eb40f36d92feb05140ae10856e1aef4ff5.png)

Also, the pack changes how the tripwire hooks look so they match the new style of the wires.

For more screenshots, check out the gallery [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visible-tripwires/gallery).
